steps.title: Calculate Maya's weekly savings
steps.content:
Maya saves $\frac{3}{4}$ of \$240 each week. Calculate this amount:
$$\text{Weekly savings} = \frac{3}{4} \times 240 = \frac{3 \times 240}{4} = \frac{720}{4} = 180$$
Maya saves \$180 each week.

steps.title: Calculate total savings over 5 weeks
steps.content:
Multiply the weekly savings by 5:
$$\text{Total savings} = 180 \times 5 = 900$$
Maya will save \$900 in 5 weeks.
